programme.title: Scorpion

programme.title: Scorpion

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Walter becomes unconscious after falling down the stairs and enters a dream world where Team Scorpion never existed.

programme.title: The Listener
programme.desc: Toby has visions of a missing girl after he bumps into a homeless man.

programme.title: The Listener
programme.desc: After Toby hooks up with a woman at a nightclub, she is found dead, and he is a suspect in her murder.

programme.title: The Listener
programme.desc: When Toby saves a troubled teen from a gang beating, he stumbles upon a hidden group of runaways.

programme.title: Southpaw
programme.desc: Boxer Billy Hope turns to a retired fighter to help him turn his life around for one last epic fight.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.desc: Two brothers prepare to go head to head in a mixed martial arts battle in order to win the prize money.

programme.title: American Fighter
programme.desc: A young wrestler competes in the world of underground fighting to raise money for his ailing mother.

programme.title: Uppercut
programme.desc: Follows Toni's journey from seeking boxing training to becoming a pioneering female boxing manager.

programme.title: The Next Three Days
programme.desc: A family man finds his world turned upside down when his wife is convicted of murdering her boss.

programme.title: Mercenary for Justice
programme.desc: As a mercenary, John Seeger (Steven Seagal) has a reputation that precedes him. That's why he's being blackmailed into performing a risky job: breaking the son of a wealthy arms dealer out of a South African prison. With his friends taken hostage, Seeger agrees to do the deed -- but finds out too late that he's been double-crossed. Not one who likes being taken for a fool, Seeger hatches an elaborate plan to get even that will make the prison break look like capture the flag.

programme.title: Wake in Fright
programme.desc: After finishing up the school term in a remote outback town, teacher John Grant (Gary Bond) looks forward to spending his holiday with his girlfriend in Sydney. But John gets waylaid in a mining town where a gambling spree leaves him completely broke. He quickly falls in with the hard-drinking locals, who constantly ply him with alcohol and force him to participate in a gruesome kangaroo hunt. Disgusted, John tries to hitchhike out of town and, when that fails, begins to contemplate suicide.

programme.title: Gang of Roses
programme.desc: A gang of gold-hunting outlaws, headed by the ruthless Left Eye Watkins (Bobby Brown), takes over the peaceful town of Flatridge, tearing the sleepy outpost to shreds as they search for riches. They murder a can-can girl, who is the sister of Rachel (Monica Calhoun), the onetime leader of a notorious all-girl gang. Rachel then rounds up her four old associates, and they seek revenge for her sister. Using teamwork and a sassy attitude, Rachel's gang goes up against Watkins' tough crew.

programme.title: Are You Here
programme.desc: In this touching dramedy, weatherman Steve (Owen Wilson) must join his off-the-grid best friend Ben (Zach Galifianakis) for Ben's estranged father's funeral.

programme.title: Honest Thief
programme.desc: Wanting to lead an honest life, a notorious bank robber turns himself in.

programme.title: Two For the Money
programme.desc: Brandon Lang loves football: an injury keeps him from the pros.

programme.title: The Gunman
programme.desc: A sniper on a mercenary assassination team kills the minister of mines of the Congo. Terrier's successful kill shot forces him into hiding. Returning to the Congo years later, he becomes the target of a hit squad himself.

programme.title: Blue Streak
programme.desc: Miles Logan (Martin Lawrence) is a talented jewel thief who has stolen $20 million dollars worth of diamonds and has hidden them at a construction site before being captured. Now, after three years in jail, he returns to pick up the diamonds only to find that the site is now a police precinct. To recover his stash, Logan has to impersonate a detective. Using his criminal expertise he solves case after case, earning the admiration of his "fellow cops" while desperately trying to get his diamonds.

programme.title: Money Train
programme.desc: Charlie, a New York City transit cop with a mountain of gambling debts, and John, his responsible, and frequently exasperated, foster brotherr, compete amicably for the affections of fellow officer Grace, but things become more serious when Charlie decides to rob the "money train" that carries the Transit Authority's daily proceeds. John must decide whether to prevent Charlie's crime or to join in on the heist.

Ben Campbell is a shy, brilliant M.I.T. student who – needing to pay school tuition – finds the answers in the cards. He is recruited to join a group of the school’s most gifted students that heads to Vegas every weekend armed with fake identities and the know-how to turn the odds at blackjack in their favor. With unorthodox math professor and stats genius Micky Rosa leading the way, they’ve cracked the code. By counting cards and employing an intricate system of signals, the team can beat the casinos big time. Seduced by the money, the Vegas lifestyle, and by his smart and sexy teammate, Jill Taylor, Ben begins to push the limits. Though counting cards isn’t illegal, the stakes are high, and the challenge becomes not only keeping the numbers straight, but staying one step ahead of the casinos’ menacing enforcer: Cole Williams.

programme.title: Facing The Giants
programme.desc: A losing coach with an underdog football team faces their giants of fear and failure on and off the field to surprising results.

programme.title: Lawrence Of Arabia
programme.desc: David Lean's splendid biography of the enigmatic T.E. Lawrence paints a complex portrait of the desert loving Englishman. When young Lawrence was attached to the British General Staff and sent to Arabia, he inspired the feuding Arabian Chieftains to rebel against the Turks, his exploits leading to the Birth of the Arabian Kingdom.

programme.title: Tell It To The Judge
programme.desc: Marsha Meredith, an attorney-at-law, is nominated for a Federal judgeship, but her nomination is opposed by a 'Good-Government' group who think her divorce makes her unfit for the job. This evolves into situations, happening in Flordia, New England, Washington D.C. and the Adirondacks, such as the misunderstood husband trying to win back his wife, and the misunderstood wife trying to make her husband jealous, and one case of mistaken identity after another, after another.

programme.title: Scandal Sheet
programme.desc: A newspaper editor's efforts to end his ex-wife's blackmail attempt become the focus of an investigative story by his ambitious protégé.

programme.title: First Men In The Moon
programme.desc: Spectacular adaptation of H. G. Well's novel of adventure and space travel.

programme.title: Candy (2006)
programme.desc: A poet falls in love with an art student who gravitates to his bohemian lifestyle -- and his love of heroin. Hooked as much on one another as they are on the drug, their relationship alternates between states of oblivion, self-destruction, and despair.

programme.title: Kingslayer
programme.desc: The Lionheart, before he ascended to become King of England, as he must fight for his life and learn the responsibilities of leadership amidst a treacherous ambush.

programme.title: Jiminy Glick In Lalawood
programme.desc: Culture critic Jiminy Glick gets tied up in a murder case at the Toronto Film Festival.

programme.title: Silver City
programme.desc: The discovery of a corpse threatens to unravel a bumbling local politician's campaign for governor of Colorado.

programme.title: Masquerade
programme.desc: A young girl struggles to survive after a group of home invaders break in to to steal her family's priceless artwork.

programme.title: Man on a Ledge
programme.desc: A police psychologist works to talk down an ex-con who is threatening to jump from a Manhattan hotel rooftop.

programme.title: Heist
programme.desc: To pay for his daughter's surgery, a card dealer teams up with a co-worker to pull off a casino heist.

programme.title: Marauders
programme.desc: A group of robbers is chased by an FBI agent who uncovers a deeper conspiracy behind the robbery-homicides.

programme.title: Den of Thieves
programme.desc: A cop and an ex-military gang leader clash when the Outlaws plan a heist at L.A.'s Federal Reserve Bank.

programme.title: Prey of Wrath
programme.desc: An elite special forces operative is sent by Russian Intelligence to hunt down former teammates who have hijacked nuclear warheads.

programme.title: The Wide West
programme.desc: 1907. A mysterious gambler aids a couple of Japanese sumo wrestlers, the local Judge and a beautiful store owner against ruthless outlaws who have attacked a small Californian town.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark
programme.desc: A group of virtual hunters unleash a deadly shark in a Texas lake, causing a young couple to fight for their lives during a peaceful fishing trip in a secluded cove.

programme.title: Karma: Death at Latigo Springs
programme.desc: Charley Stevens moves to the town where her recently deceased mother grew up; after arriving, she is plagued with strange nightmares that tease a horrific event, hinting at why her mother left town.

programme.title: Meteor: Day One
programme.desc: A quest begins to find an ancient dial that controls the skies.

programme.title: Train to Busan
programme.desc: A man (Gong Yoo), his estranged daughter and other passengers become trapped on a speeding train during a zombie outbreak in South Korea.

programme.title: Kung Fu Stuntmen
programme.desc: Filmmakers showcase the dedication and struggles of kung fu stuntmen and action directors working in Hong Kong cinema during the 1960s-'80s.

programme.title: Max Cloud
programme.desc: When a teenage gamer accidentally opens a portal into her favorite side-scroller, she becomes trapped in a notorious intergalactic prison, home to the galaxy's most dangerous villains. To escape, she must finish the game with a little help from her not-so-savvy friend on the outside -- or remain a 16-bit character forever.

programme.title: Enter the Fat Dragon
programme.desc: A police officer investigates the mysterious death of a suspect who was in his custody during a routine transfer.

programme.title: A Janitor
programme.desc: Fukumi is a high school janitor whose father was a gangster. He works at the school as a janitor instead of belonging to the gang so he can watch out for Yui, the daughter of his deceased father's brother Majima Yoshiki.

programme.title: Murdaugh Murders: The Movie - Part 2
programme.desc: Alex Murdaugh called police and reported his wife Maggie and son Paul dead.

programme.title: Husband, Father, Killer: The Alyssa Pladl Story
programme.desc: Alyssa puts her child up for adoption. 18 years later, she seeks her parents out.

programme.title: Beyond The Headlines: The Watts Family Tragedy
programme.desc: Includes exclusive never-before-seen footage and new interviews with Tammy Lee.

programme.title: Living with My Mother's Killer
programme.desc: Mara forgives the man who killed her mom and allows him to work on her property.

programme.title: My Child Has My Doctor's Face
programme.desc: Jessica discovers that her son's biological father is her fertility doctor.

programme.title: Mommy's Stolen Memories
programme.desc: Mallory's life flips when son Billy is drawn to mysterious Samantha at the pool.

programme.title: Fatal Performance
programme.desc: A struggling actress is hired to impersonate a woman for a business meeting, but soon finds her life in danger.

programme.title: Campus Caller
programme.desc: When a university student goes missing, her mother a former cop goes in search for her.

programme.title: Get Out Alive
programme.desc: An estranged couple on a retreat have to put aside their problems to survive their targetting by criminals.

programme.title: Love at the Bootcamp
programme.desc: A scattered marketing exec helps rebrand a bootcamp and discovers its strict owner may be just what she needs.

programme.title: The Perfect Man(icure)
programme.desc: Katya partners with consultant Ryan to sell her manicure device at the upcoming Beauty Expo.

programme.title: The Challenger
programme.desc: The Challenger follows the life struggles of a young, Bronx auto mechanic, Jaden Miller. When Jaden and his mother are evicted from their home, he soon finds that boxing may be the key to stop them from living on the streets and the ticket to a better life. With legendary trainer, Duane Taylor, Miller becomes a local hero and captures the attention of a cable network that decides to create a reality show around his goal to fight to the Light-Heavyweight Title.

programme.title: Take Back
programme.desc: Zara (Gillian White) and Brian (Michael Jai White) are living the perfect small town life when a mysterious stranger from Zara's secret past kidnaps their daughter and now they must race to save her life.

programme.title: Call Her King
programme.desc: After sentencing a notorious gangster to death, Judge Jaeda King must rely on her wits, strength and skill when her courtroom is taken over by force by the prisoner's brother.

programme.title: The New Girl
programme.desc: When her sister Monica suddenly disappears under suspicious circumstances, Malorie becomes convinced that Monica's seemingly perfect husband is hiding something sinister. She then launches her own investigation and unearths a twisted web of lies, abuse, and even political conspiracy. Malorie must confront dangerous secrets that not only threaten her sister's life but her own.

programme.title: CODE
programme.desc: Dallas artist MALIK SCHAEFER, also known as CODE, is a rising star in the underground rap scene. Although his checkered past has led him down the wrong road at times, with the help of his best friend, STYLES, Malik is back on the fast-track to success. That is, until he reconnects with the dangerous love of his life, SOPHIA ORTEGA, who threatens to destroy it all. Malik must decide to either follow his heart or live by the code that has served him well for many years: family over everything.

programme.title: 10 Kilos in the Trunk
programme.desc: Tonya needs to make some quick cash for the holidays, and takes a job transporting cocaine. On the way to the drop-off, her car breaks down in the middle of nowhere. While walking to a gas station for help, she is stopped by a police officer, and arrested for several warrants. Now in jail, Tonya, gets her friend Monica to make the delivery. Monica must get the car fixed, avoid a thief looking to steal the product, and make the delivery by the deadline or both will face deadly consequences.

programme.title: Everything I Never Expected
programme.desc: Opposites attract when a spoiled bachelor and a broke college grad accidentally become roommates. Forced to cohabitate in a less-than-ideal apartment, they clash, prank, and eventually fall for each other. Life challenges and misunderstandings complicate their budding romance, but true love prevails.

programme.title: Toxic Affair
programme.desc: A young woman abandoned by her mother and raised by her father has a miscarriage which derails her life. In an attempt to find support, she seeks out her married sister, only to find herself in a toxic affair.

programme.title: The Calling
programme.desc: Tamar has been called to become a minister, and for most, this would be an honorable moment, but for Tamar, it is the worst thing that could happen. Tamar is the daughter of prominent Deacon Jessup, and is a lesbian. Taught that her desires are not that of God, Tamar has suppressed them for the last 16 years and has never dated a woman. When the Future Minister’s Ministry opens for a new class, Tamar finds herself falling for the only other woman in the class.

programme.title: Titanic II
programme.desc: History threatens to repeat itself during a voyage to commemorate the liner's 100th anniversary.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: After a game of Zombie hide-and-seek, Addy and Doc convince the family to follow them to Murphy.

programme.title: Disaster Strike Force
programme.desc: Plummeting temperatures signify the dawn of a new Ice Age.

programme.title: 2025 Armageddon
programme.desc: Aliens attack Earth using the gigantic creatures and disasters found on a B-movie TV Channel.

programme.title: Death Racers
programme.desc: Criminals compete in a race to the death with the winners earning their freedom.

programme.title: Planet of the Sharks
programme.desc: In the future, sharks dominate the planet, led by a mutated alpha shark, as human survivors live in terror.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Races Jetherine" - When Sonny Drysdale promises to give Elly May a ring, Granny thinks he's going to propose and becomes a matchmaker. Cousin Pearl can't stand the idea that Elly May will get married before Jethrine, so she sets to matchmaking Jethrine with Jasper Depew.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Pygmalion and Elly" - Sonny Drysdale decides he needs to be Pygmalion to Elly's Galatea and remake her from a hillbilly into a woman of society, while Granny uses love charms to heat up their relationship.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly's First Date" - Mr. Drysdale convinces his self-absorbed stepson Sonny to date Elly May to Mrs. Drysdale's consternation, while Granny and Jed make preparations for Thanksgiving.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jethro Goes to School" - Jed enrolls Jethro at an exclusive Beverly Hills elementary school. Millicent Schuyler-Potts, the proprietor of the school, is aghast when Jed and Jethro show up, convinced this is part of some ghastly hoax. After Jed says that banker Milburn Drysdale is his neighbor, she calls the banker. It turns out that Drysdale's bank holds the mortgage on the school. Schulyer-Potts suddenly warms to the charms of the Clampetts, even if it means accepting Jethro as a fifth grader.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Servants" - Ellie May starts wearing dresses but takes it as an insult when someone says she looks like a city girl. Mr. Drysdale talks Jed into taking in his butler and upstairs girl in a plan to civilize the Clampetts, but they don't quite understand the idea of servants. Miss Hathaway takes Jethro bowling and begins to show an interest in him.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Trick or Treat" - Granny wants to go home because "folks is so unfriendly, no one has come to call." Jed convinces her that they should call on them, and they find that people welcome them and give them all manner of gifts when they show up on Halloween in their normal hillbilly clothes. Also, Jed works on getting Pearl to come visit while she's trying to get hitched to the oilman and find a young man for Jethrine.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Race for Queen" - Elly May competes in a contest to determine "The Queen of Beverly Hills."

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Lafe Lingers On" - Lafe Crick comes back in another scheme to get rich off the Clampetts' wealth.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: Land of Hunted Men
programme.desc: A band of outlaws is terrorizing a town in the West. Leave it to Ray Crash Corrigan and his Range Busters to ride in and save the day. This film marked the return of Corrigan to the famous series; he had appeared in the first sixteen movies but left for a brief hiatus following 1942's ARIZONA STAGECOACH. This was the 21st of 24 movies in the Range Busters series. Produced between 1940-1943, the Range Busters were a huge financial success for Monogram Pictures.

programme.title: Lost Canyon

programme.title: Fast Bullets

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly dodges cooking duty by bringing in guest Chef Leah Cohen to tackle a fan's fridge. Leah whips up incredible Chicken Lettuce Wraps using ground chicken, hoisin, and leftover rice. The hosts talk Pop-A-Shot basketball, picky kids, and Michael gives away a very meaningful piece of his restaurant history.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon takes on the Fan Fridge challenge, cooking from Pat in Peoria's refrigerator. He prepares a beautiful Pan-Roasted Salmon with crispy skin, served alongside a bright Greek-inspired salad of avocado, cucumber, olives, feta, and red curry paste. The crew jokes about Nick's organizing skills and reads fan mail.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Fan Fridge Week wraps up on Friday as Carla Hall transforms leftovers into a decadent Banana Bread French Toast. Using cottage cheese, oat milk, and eggs for a rich custard, she tops the sweet treat with a tart lemonade reduction, fresh berries, and chocolate syrup. The hosts discuss taking the show on the road in a van.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly embraces "sweater weather" by making a savory Butternut Squash, Spinach, and Blue Cheese Pie. While he cooks, the hosts discuss expensive clothing habits and the woes of tight pants. A cooking question about pie layers hilariously derails into a conversation about dating terminology, and Michael reveals he is passing the Thanksgiving hosting torch to his son. The episode concludes with Michael giving away a lucky golf putter.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: In this Memorial Day-themed episode of Simply Symons, Michael Symon cooks outdoors with his wife Liz and co-host Olivia Annacone Cisic, preparing grilled shrimp skewers with a honey-soy-orange glaze, a pineapple salsa, and a coconut rice pilaf, while Liz mixes up a frothy pineapple daiquiri with an egg-white twist. The episode opens with playful banter about Olivia's discovery of gray hairs at 33, her upcoming bachelorette party plans, and Michael's gentle ribbing of the trio's early-dinner, early-bedtime lifestyle. Michael walks through his Memorial Day menu, highlighting a coconut rice made with jasmine rice, coconut milk, and a coconut curry lime bone broth from friend Marco Canora's brand Brodo, plus a bright pineapple salsa built with cilantro, scallion, red pepper, jalapeño, honey, and a dashi soy sauce sourced from Santa Monica's McCall's butcher. A lively debate breaks out over rice ratios and rinsing technique, with Liz advocating for a 1:1¾ ratio while Michael sticks to his two-to-one method, and Olivia sharing that she recently cooked jasmine rice for her unwell dog Zeke. Throughout the cooking session, mishaps and humor keep things lively — limes refuse to juice, Liz nearly topples the dashi bottle, and Michael accidentally steps on their dog Min. Discussions range from shrimp varieties and sizing (the U-number system), to the fruity heat of jalapeños and habaneros, to favorite hot sauces including Crystal and the Florida datil-pepper-based Zabs. Liz's honest palate becomes a recurring theme, with Michael crediting her direct, critical feedback as a key ingredient in his culinary success over the years. Liz dry-shakes her egg-white pineapple daiquiri before adding ice for a frothy finish, then adjusts the balance mid-tasting by swirling in extra pineapple juice. The shrimp grill up with beautiful caramelization from the honey glaze, and the coconut rice is finished simply with cilantro and cracked black pepper. During the final tasting, Olivia — a self-described texture-averse pasta lover — bravely tries the shrimp, endorsing the flavors while admitting she prefers the coconut rice. Michael closes the episode wishing viewers a happy Memorial Day and reminding them to keep things simple and delicious.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Guest Danielle Sepsy of The Hungry Gnome joins the kitchen to bake her famous, plush Honey Corn Muffins. As the muffins bake, Clinton and Danielle test Carla and Michael's Long Island accents in a hilarious roleplay game. They also play Chew It or Screw It, share Thanksgiving food disaster stories, and give away a $75 gift card to Danielle's bakery to a fan in Virginia.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Kicking off Thanksgiving week, Clinton Kelly prepares a seasonal Delicata Squash Salad with goat cheese and pepitas. As the crew enjoys the autumn flavors, they discuss Thanksgiving versus Friendsgiving, dive into a comprehensive timeline for holiday prep, and give away a prize to a lucky fan from Oregon.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's Thanksgiving Eve, and Carla Hall takes the stress out of holiday cooking with her fast and flavorful Turkey Scallopini topped with a Cranberry Gastrique. The hosts share their best organizational tips, including Michael's famous oven grid and platter sticky notes. The trio also swaps hilarious stories about cooking under pressure and celebrity encounters.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon celebrates New Year's Eve by sharing his Eastern European family tradition of eating pork and sauerkraut for good luck, making a simple and deeply satisfying Pork and Sauerkraut Stew with pork shoulder, smoked paprika, and beer. The hosts stay in low-key holiday mode, swapping stories about card games, New Year's traditions, and the comfort of staying home.

programme.title: Simply Symons

The episode opens with playful banter about Olivia's discovery of gray hairs at 33, her upcoming bachelorette party plans, and Michael's gentle ribbing of the trio's early-dinner, early-bedtime lifestyle. programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: During "holiday reset week," Clinton Kelly bakes a festive Stromboli Wreath in a bundt pan. The hosts discuss their vastly different childhoods, play "Holiday Do or Don't," and Michael shares a hilariously horrifying mix-up involving the Hotel Chelsea in New York.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Special guest Liz Symon joins the kitchen to bake her foolproof Orange Olive Oil Cake. While she bakes, Liz and Michael laugh off a viral AI rumor that they divorced, reveal their morning Wordle routines, and recall a disastrous early date involving bad crab stuffed shells.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Guest Amy Sedaris joins the crew for a festive break! Michael leans into his Greek heritage to bake savory Spanakopita triangles, while Clinton and Amy get crafty making adorable "Pinecone Gnomes." The group plays "Chew It or Screw It," debates edible glitter, and shares their most hated foods.

programme.title: Winning Mealtime
programme.desc: Winning Mealtime - Sunday Gravy All Week: We don't need to tell you that kids like spaghetti and meatballs. Who doesn't? And Sunday gravy—with its chunks of fatty meat and sausage bobbing around in red sauce with the meatballs—is even better. Now, the real prize is what else you can do with that gravy. It's not just for lasagna and eggplant parm. Chris Ying shows you his Sunday Gravy recipe, and then how to take that same punchy, meaty, tomato-based umami sauce and use it to make beefy bean and cheese burritos and ratatouille.

programme.title: Winning Mealtime
programme.desc: Winning Mealtime - Whole Roasted Chicken with Morgan McGlone: Our friend Morgan McGlone has cooked a lot of chicken—or "chook," as they call it in Australia, where he's from. He's a hell of a chef and restaurateur, as well as an excellent father to his son, Ryo. In this episode, he talks us through his roast chicken method, which, spoiler alert, involves a lot of butter. This is a bit of a long cook, so it's more of a weekend dish, but nothing beats breaking into a whole chicken with your family. The kids get to see food in its whole form, and pick the pices they want. The only decision you have to make is whether to share the best bits, or save them for yourself.

programme.title: Winning Mealtime
programme.desc: Winning Mealtime: Hacky Pad Thai for the Whole Family - This... is not pad thai. It has everything you love about pad thai—umami, sweetness, chewy rice noodles, brightness from lime—but this is the super hacky version I make for my wife and kids whenever I come across a package of fresh or semi-fresh noodles at the Asian market. If one of my Thai friends comes over, I'm hiding this from them. (If you're watching this, I'm sorry. It's all in the name of feeding the kids!) Ingredient-wise, you can keep tamarind and fish sauce in the fridge and pork belly in the freezer, but this recipe really depends on whether or not you have the noodles, which aren't available everywhere. You can use the dried kind, but I don't prefer them because they never seem to get to the right texture.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Butter Board" - Wow, even Chris couldn’t resist the call of the #butterboard. Here he makes an anchovy-onion-olive version inspired by something he saw on TikTok and his favorite French-Italian flatbread, pissaladière

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Chicken Pot Pie" - Chris makes a recipe for beginner chicken pot pie from Allrecipes.com, using leftover chicken and canned potatoes. Yes, potatoes from a can.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Dave makes a quick snack that you might see more and more often in the coming years: dried squid. He talks about the rising amount of cephalopods in the ocean, the specific umami and texture of squid, and ponders if it might be coming to more and more grocery store shelves near you. He also answers an Ask Dave about London eating, and general dining strategy when on a short trip in a new place.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Dave is joined by The Podfather himself, founder and CEO of The Ringer, Bill Simmons. Dave makes steaks that challenge Bill's wet-aged vs dry-aged opinions, and then they discuss his "Secret to basketball," which applies to much more than just sports - and explains Bill's unique ability to find and foster talent, as well as predict future trends. They finish with a discussion of the Top 5 American Chefs in history, and a MOIF about whether or not a movie director can be considered great if they've never filmed food.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Dave cooks jangjorim, a Korean braised dish usually served as a side, but that Dave thinks could be an entree and a star. He also discusses how to know when rice is properly washed, as well as the difference between mu radish and daikon (amongst other Korean and Japanese foods). Dave finishes the episode by answering an Ask Dave about who he would want as company for his dream last meal and his answer is...surprising.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Dave is joined by a friend of the podcast, Noelle, partner at Majordomo Media, as he cooks her a meaningful dish that she did not know he was going to make. They talk about Paris (related to the dish), changes in the global dining scene, and some necessary improvements on the rules of sharing food.

programme.desc: Chef Stellino explores the history, traditions and uses of the artichoke. programme.title: Nick Stellino: Storyteller in the Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Stellino shares the story of how his father's dream became his reality as he prepares Vincenzo's favorite dishes, including:: Mussels with Garlic and Ginger / Swordfish with Peas and Tomato Sauce / Gelo Di Melone (Watermelon pudding).

programme.title: Nick Stellino: Storyteller in the Kitchen
programme.desc: Nick recounts the first time a group of friends treated him to his first American breakfast and the influence it had on him as a chef. Dishes include: Eggs Benedict "Stellino Style" / Poached Eggs over Chorizo Hash with Tequila Sauce / Chocolate Chip Pancakes.

programme.title: Nick Stellino: Storyteller in the Kitchen
programme.desc: Nick ponders on the question of whether or not he could ever be a vegetarian. The answer is a solid "no." However, he has fun trying and in the process discovers some fabulous new dishes which are not exactly vegetarian, but nonetheless are loaded with spectacular flavors. Dishes include: Chilled Cantaloupe Soup / Salmon with Spinach and Pancetta Cream Sauce / Biancomangiare (Sicilian Almond Pudding).

programme.title: Nick Stellino: Storyteller in the Kitchen
programme.desc: Nick describes about what it takes to be in touch with yourself as a chef and what lessons to look at to further culinary passion. Dishes Include: Salad Lyonnaise with Poached Egg / Pork Schnitzel with Jaeger Sauce / Strawberry Pudding.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Coffee expert Joey Chase goes on a pilgrimage along an ancient Ethiopian trading route that starts with the modern latte art cafes in Addis Ababa, then through the coffee kingdom of Jimma to the 10,000+-year-old wild coffee Yayu Forest. Village elders share the age-old secrets of hand processing, fire-pit roasting, and brewing of beans followed by a traditional feast.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: After sharing a first-ever taste of coffee in a remote Maasai village, followed by an exploration of the terrain with some new-found friends, Joey explores a grandiose coffee estate in Mt. Kenya. He then jousts with coffee buyers in Nairbobi's auction house and experiences the hand sorting and elaborate tasting of over 100 distinctive coffees in a British Tudor-style plantation cottage.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Touting the practicality of gondola travel, Joey explores the canals of Venice and discovers the oldest coffee shop in Europe. The trail to classic Italian espresso leads from Illy Coffee near the high-fashion metropolis of Trieste to the medieval town of Scarperia where espresso machines are manufactured. Florence boasts a famous barista who prepares a masterful farewell espresso.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: An exploration of Paris's distinctive cafe culture reveals a renaissance of coffee-inspired cuisine, pastries, and spirits. World-renowned "Noses" in the south of France reveal the complex contribution that fragrance and aroma make toward the perfect cup as Joey pursues the development of a coffee perfume.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Bob Marley's son Rohan takes Joey on a journey from the streets of Kingston to the peaks of the Blue Mountains. From waterfall plunges and grazing tropical fruits on Rohan's farm to roasting the smoothest coffee on earth and enjoying a Jamaican feast that ends with a Marley-hosted jam session, Joey discovers the pulse of Jamaica through the lens of Marley Coffee.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: From four-star cuisine to cappuccino on horseback, Joey explores the historic cobblestone streets and coffee estates of Antigua. A puddle jumper flight along the rims of active volcanoes leads to the age-old Mayan towns around Lake Atitlan where coffee-harvesting communities offer a glimpse of ancient traditions.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: The pursuit of the sweetest "honey" coffees on earth unleashes an adventure that includes "coffee monkeys", crocodiles, toucans, an exploration of the active crater of Volcan Poas, and surfing on the coast with a coffee farmer. The Costa Rican paradise reveals a uniquely artistic approach toward colorful honey coffees stored like wine and served just in time for a classic "coffee sock" brew.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Joey hits the streets of Bogota to check out the controversial trade in emeralds, the famous Juan Valdez Cafe, and some classic Colombian cuisine at an elevation of 10,000 feet. A flight to Armenia and subsequent Willy's Jeep trek uncover a remote and hidden world of quaint coffee towns and boutique farms where Joey hosts a group of international coffee buyers.

programme.title: Foodie Guide to Québec City

programme.desc: Prague is as beautiful as it is historic, and it’s also one of the best cities in Europe for photography. After navigating the city streets to find the best photo spots, Elia gets a tour of Erik Johansson's photography studio.

programme.title: Moments in Time with Elia Locardi
programme.desc: The Netherlands is well known for the countless picturesque Dutch windmills that are incredible for photography, especially with the right foggy conditions. After a successful morning shoot, Elia joins the famous King's Day celebrations.

programme.title: Moments in Time with Elia Locardi
programme.desc: It is tulip photo mania in the Netherlands! Elia joins local photographer Albert Dros to photograph one of the largest tulip fields in the world. Later, two of Elia's friends compete in a photography challenge, using Elia as their model.

programme.title: Moments in Time with Elia Locardi
programme.desc: Ari Amphibia take Elia to Jakarta's two best vantage points to capture the cityscape. After a successful photoshoot, Elia joins Gathot Subroto on a trip to a wet market, then heads to Dutchtown for a bike ride.

programme.title: Moments in Time with Elia Locardi
programme.desc: Elia battles mud and heavy crowds to capture one of the best sunrise photos in the world. Later, he joins Fujifilm X-Photographer La Mo to explore the peaceful Ta Som temple where they capture some beautiful shots of a Buddhist monk.

programme.title: Secrets of the Caribbean
programme.desc: Plastic waste is becoming a tremendous problem worldwide, and in the Caribbean, the issue can be witnessed firsthand. Also, spend some time with children who use art as a great way to express themselves, and visit a Mayreau place of peace.

programme.title: Andiamo! Uptown
programme.desc: Join Donna and visit a jewel of an Asian country- Singapore. Experience a place that weaves a confluence of cultures into its fabric, evident in the city's unique cuisine. Witness acrobat training, explore the fine art of tea, and more.

programme.title: Andiamo! Uptown
programme.desc: Donna explores Dubai, one of the gems of the Middle East. While there, she discovers Emirati culture and cuisine, experiences an upscale desert safari, goes scuba diving, and more. There is so much to experience in Dubai.

programme.title: Discovering the World
programme.desc: This is Hong Kong, a city whose ambition is to set a new benchmark for Asia. Laser beams shoot skywards, accentuating the angles of skyscrapers set in neon. Over the bay, the heavy sails of a junk-boat reflect flashes of color, while streaks of light glisten in the wake of the Star ferry.

programme.title: The Silk Road
programme.desc: Marvel at the pleasure gardens of Fin in the oasis of Kashan. In the nearby mountains, visit the temple of Chak Chak and become introduced to the ancestral religion of Zoroastrianism. In the sacred city of Yazd, visit a zurkhaneh, or a "house of strength," where athletes engage in training sessions.

programme.title: The Silk Road
programme.desc: Halfway along the ancient Silk Road we arrive in Uzbekistan, first visiting the glorious city of Bukhara, the hometown of Avicenna, and renowned artists and craftsmen. The city's bazaar is the beating heart of the city, and a bubbling melting-pot of cultures where all manor of items are sold.

programme.title: The Toque 12
programme.desc: The stunning restaurants we experienced, and the exceptional culinary masters we learned valuable insights from, have more to share as we join host Phil Davenport for a final hurrah to what was a truly memorable visit to Malaysia.

programme.title: The Toque 12

programme.desc: Venture off the beaten path and explore Seoul, South Korea. Visit the internationally renowned World Ceramics Center, and the Korean Folk Village where they reveal life from ages ago. programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas agrees to do a good deed for Pop, the town drunk who is dying, by going along with a story that his ranch is owned by Pop. When Pop's son, Philip, arrives from back east the story backfires and now his son wants restitution.

programme.title: Pale Rider

Preacher fends off the attacks, and then goes directly to LaHood to negotiate. When the miners, led by Hull Barret (Michael Moriarty), refuse the terms, LaHood sends in Marshall Stockburn (John Russell) to take down Preacher and the others.

programme.title: Rango

Though at first Rango only role-plays, a series of thrilling situations and outrageous encounters forces him to become a real hero.

programme.title: Finny The Shark - Down In The Bay and more
programme.desc: Did you ever see a shark glowing in the dark? Did you ever see a stingray dancing at the ballet? Finny and Mama Shark are singing a rhyming song about all of their silly friends down in the bay! Sing along!

programme.title: Over The Deep Blue Sea - Puppets - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Yo-ho-ho! Review different types of weather while climbing aboard a pirate ship with the Super Simple Puppets! We’re going this way, that way. Forwards, backwards. Up and down, up and down. Over the deep blue sea.

programme.title: Five Little Chicks - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Five Little Chicks is great for nap time and for practicing counting down from five. Try singing along when it’s time for a nap.

programme.title: Rosey & The Rowdy Rustlers Tour Bus - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Rosey and The Rowdy Rustlers are coming to town to kick off their concert tour! But while driving out on the open road, a giant stray tumbleweed gets in the path of their tour bus, making a mighty mess! Rosey, Roxie, and Rude Jenny will have to take a detour to Carl’s Car Wash! With a quick mess assessment, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Rosey and The Rowdy Rustlers’ vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! The band leaves as happy customers, and just in time for the concert!

programme.title: Who Took The Cookie? (Finny the Shark) - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Finny’s friends are playing a game of Who Took The Cookie From The Cookie Jar. Who do you think took the cookie? The seahorse, the starfish, the octopus, the walrus, the dolphin, or the crab? Let’s play and find out!

programme.title: Moolissa The Underwater Cow - Finny The Shark and more
programme.desc: Finny’s class finds out they have a new special friend coming for a visit, a cow named Moolisa! Being from land, it can be tricky for Moolisa to do everything that Finny’s friends do in the sea, but Moolisa will try her best to share in all the experiences of life in the ocean.

programme.title: Five Little Monsters Jumping On The Bed - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s a silly and slightly spooky version of the classic kids’ rhyme, Five Little Monkeys, with monsters instead of monkeys. It’s a great song for practicing counting down from five, and for teaching little monsters (and children!) not to jump on the bed.

programme.title: Red Light Green Light - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Tobee learned all about traffic safety in school today! He learned how to walk in a crosswalk, to look both ways before crossing a street, and what the colors of a traffic light mean. That reminds Caitie of a song about stopping and going called “Red Light, Green Light.” Together, they sing and dance, stopping and starting again and again. Tobee and Caitie have a blast, and you can join the fun, too! Green light!

programme.title: Twinkle Twinkle Little Star - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: “Twinkle, twinkle little star. How I wonder what you are?” Lulu the Owl and Juno the Star become fast friends in this Super Simple version of one of the world’s most popular nursery rhymes.

programme.title: With My Heart - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Feel the warmth and learn the five senses in this heart warming Super Simple sensory song for kids. It’s also a perfect song to celebrate all parents. I can hear with my ears. I can see with my eyes.

programme.title: Weepy French Onion Soup - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Today, the Bumble Nums are going to make Weepy French Onion Soup. But the four weepy onions they need are VERY tricky to find. Will Humble, Grumble, and Stumble be able to spot all the onions and get back to the kitchen without crying too much? Watch and see!

programme.title: Seven Steps - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Counting to seven has never been more memorable and fun! Learn numbers with this simple counting song.

programme.title: Put On Your Shoes - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s a Super Simple Song all about getting dressed! Sing along as we put on our shoes, jacket, hat, and scarf and then head out for a walk with the family.

programme.title: With My Heart - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Feel the warmth and learn the five senses in this heart warming Super Simple sensory song for kids. It’s also a perfect song to celebrate all parents. I can hear with my ears. I can see with my eyes.

programme.title: Let's Count To 100 - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: We are learning to count to 100 with Finny the Shark! This is a perfect numbers song for young kids and preschoolers! Let’s count to 100. Counting’s so much fun. Let’s count to 100. We’ll start from number 1.

programme.title: Let's Count To 100 - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: We are learning to count to 100 with Finny the Shark! This is a perfect numbers song for young kids and preschoolers! Let’s count to 100. Counting’s so much fun. Let’s count to 100. We’ll start from number 1.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A girl who lives in the Netherlands asks for a tiny dress, a 'Dream Dress". When Jett and Bucky arrive, Nina tells them that she hopes it won't get taken, as a lot of things have been disappearing from her doll house lately. A girl on Easter Island asks for giant propeller caps for the Moai statues near her home. But the wind picks up and turns the Moai into head-helicopters.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A Scottish boy named Rooney asks the Super Wings to create a special mega-sized soccer uniform for his friend Jack, who is a tractor. Jack needs the uniform for an upcoming match of Tractor Soccer. A boy in Hawaii orders a special vacuum to clean up the garbage he's found in a bay where he rescued a young sea turtle. Before releasing the turtle, they discover a massive garbage island.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett's friend from Japan, Namiko, orders enormous sheets of origami paper. She and her friends use them for the Paper Rangers fan convention. But an animatronic of Paper Rangers' enemy Drac the Ripper goes haywire. Jett and Donnie deliver special tires to a boy named Gaspard in the Gobi Desert. Enjo gets overconfident with the new tires and accidentally startles some sheep.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: World Aircraft is flying through the Himalayas when an order comes in from a house near Mt Everest. Jett and Dizzy are sent to deliver some mega-sized art supplies to two brothers who want to make a mega-sized "Good Luck" card for their Dad. He's about to climb Mt. Everest! But when World Aircraft gets into trouble and crashes, it's going to take more than a Supercharge to save it!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A girl in Bogota asks for a spray-painting drone. When her jealous little dog steals the controls causing the drone to paint the town, they must get it back before he makes a huge mess. Jett and Donnie travel to Germany to bring a long wig to a girl named Kirsten. She wants to dress up as the famous princess, Rapunzel. Kirsten learns that it takes more than a wig to be a princess.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A girl in Switzerland orders an early release copy of a new book by a teenage adventure author. Discovering that the last chapter is missing, the Super Wings help her find the author. A boy named Pavel whose hobby is repairing watches, orders a special Super Wings wristwatch. Pavel takes them to see the Astronomy Clock in the Old Town Square, but they discover the old clock has stopped.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When a boy and his grandmother board a luxury train in South Africa with self-inflating balloons, some animals cause the balloons to inflate, sending the train up into the sky. A girl named Kate from Bunbury, Australia, asks for a scanner that can go underwater. Jett and Mira learn that Kate needs it to analyze her favorite dolphin, Ninotchka. But Ninotchaka takes off after an undersea earthquake.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: On Halloween, a boy in California orders his own fully-functional Super Wings costume. But a haunted house scares Donnie haywire and he gets a giant pumpkin decoration stuck on his head! Jett and Paul fly to Cairo, where a girl has ordered a special item to help her lead a tour of the Cairo Museum for her friends. But the girl's little brother accidentally brings the mummies and sphinx to life!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Two boys who are pals that live in Greece, are huge mythology fans. They ask for a card game with mythological creatures that are holograms. When the creatures get too big, they threaten to destroy a town. A boy who loves everything about wizards wants to be a real wizard with a real magic wand. The closest Storm can come to making one is a toy wand with some Supercharge energy stored in it.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A girl in Moscow with a rock collection orders a special box with compartments labeled for the coolest rocks ever. When she discovers that her collection doesn't have the last three rocks needed to complete the box, the Superwings must help her get them by going on a trip into space, because the rocks needed are space rocks!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A Dad in Brazil orders a special explorer's outfit for his son. A huge wave rushes up the Amazon River and threatens the river animals and a village. A girl living in Dezhou China, is excited that she and her parents are hosting the Chinese New Year celebrations for the whole family. But traffic jams on land, sea, and air cause trouble for all the family members from other provinces.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A girl, Akaja, asks the Super Wings for molds that can make multi-colored ice blocks. She wants the blocks to build an igloo that holds a playground that holds a playground. A boy named Nuno in Porto, Portugal orders a large, clear, unbreakable bottle. He wants to build a model boat in a bottle. When the SWs and he shrink down to build the boat, the bottle is accidentally knocked out of a window.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A girl in Kuala Lumpur orders a special swing for the new baby orangutan to play on. But a mishap makes the orangutan become king-sized and it escapes from the zoo. A girl in Mexico named Daniela orders some cat treats shaped like marigolds. Jett and Astra learn that Daniela wants to use the treats to attract the attention of her recently deceased cat, Sanchez, for 'Day of The Dead.'

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A girl named Ruma in Bangladesh orders a Table Top Cricket Game with moving players. Ruma and her friends like the game, but want to play a real game of cricket. A boy from France orders a machine that can make nutritious cotton candy out of vegetables. It's for a world culture fair being held at the boy's school. The boy puts too many vegetables into the machine creating a catastrophe!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: World Aircraft returns to World Airport for a special day of races in front of the Super Wings' biggest fans - the children of the world! The contestants are in for a test when a surprise challenger shows up. A girl living in Michoacán, Mexico orders a pair of costume butterfly wings and a flower crown. She hopes the butterflies will think she's a butterfly too and will land on her flower crown.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a Pasta Making Machine to a boy in Pisa, Italy. The machine is to help him win a contest for the biggest noodle in town. Jett delivers a Spinning Top to a boy, Kenta, in Sapporo, Japan! Kenta wants to use the top to enter the Spinning Top Competition at the local Snow Festival. Things go well until Golden Boy enters the competition, by making himself into a spinning top.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Jet Pet join a girl and her father to look for a lost tiger kitten's mother in the jungle of Madhya Pradesh, India - the same jungle from the girl's favorite book, "The Jungle Book" by Rudyard Kipling. Jett delivers drone wings to a girl, Lea, in Geneva. They are for her car, Leo, who now can fly, a skill that he hopes will win him the "Best Car of the Year" award at a local Motor show.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Jett Pet deliver a fan letter to Trevor, a young musician and old friend of the Super Wings. When he learns his biggest fan is in the hospital, Trevor really wants to go perform for him too, but their tour bus breaks down in the middle of the desert. A welcome ceremony at the National Aviation Museum in Seoul is being held for Korea's oldest plane. But the old plane crashes on the way!

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Hop aboard to see vehicles that travel by land, water and sky! See real-life images of cars, boats and planes in this on-the-go adventure that features cameos from some of your favorite Baby Einstein characters, all while listening to music from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: With the Dolittle, and other Baby programs under their belts, the tots who follow Julie Aigner-Clark's Baby Einstein series will sidle up to Baby Newton expecting a similar exploration of building blocks to brilliance, but this time there's a wrinkle or two. Animation makes its first appearance, and parents steeped in keep-it-simple culture may object to the springy "I Know My Shapes" song, a departure from classical-only video predecessors.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Meet Cats, Dogs, Birds, Bugs and Woodland Creatures! Learn simple words through narration and repetition. Meet all sorts of creatures from domestic kittens to jungle cats, puppies, big and small birds, butterflies, lady bugs, otters and deer!! See whimsical toys and puppets.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies turn one year old, they continue to develop their communication skills. Meanwhile, with you as their guide, they also begin to explore the world beyond their front door. Baby's Favorite Places presents them with a playful introduction to 20 words for the names of familiar locations from the market, to the library, to the local park.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Meet fascinating creatures from across the globe and learn to run, hop, and crawl like your favorite animal friends. Dance and sing along to discover animal names and the native habitats of the world's most unique creatures. See real-life images of lions and zebras on the African savannah, then learn animal names through repetition and narration, or simply watch your favorite animals play!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones' curiosity about the world blossoms, you can help sow the seeds of discovery with Baby MacDonald: A Day on the Farm. Featuring live-action images, nursery rhymes and fun-filled puppet shows, this playful, interactive program introduces little ones to the exciting sights and sounds of a real working farm.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Learn about the numbers 1,2,3,4 & 5 through rhyme, real-life footage, counting, stories, and repetition - accompanied by classical music and real world imagery.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Early on in babies' development, they begin to recognize primary colors such as blue, red, and yellow. And all the while, they're also processing an infinite variety of new sights and sounds. Think of the joy you'll experience as you introduce your little one to beautiful music and imagery with Baby Beethoven Symphony of Fun.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover instruments through narration and repetition. Real-life images and sounds will engage viewers as they dance to upbeat classical favorites from Beethoven, Mozart and more. Join your favorite Baby Einstein characters to discover what makes each instrument unique!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Babies love animals, and now you can bring animals from the seven continents home to your baby. Meet dozens of exotic animals including Asian pandas, Australian kangaroos and Arctic snow monkeys...all filmed in their beautiful, natural habitats. Rhythms and songs inspired by faraway lands have been orchestrated especially for little ears and encourage your baby to sing, dance and play to the world beats. You'll laugh together at the funny puppet shows featuring moms and their baby animals.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones become increasingly mobile, their fascination with all things that move intensifies too. On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring exposes babies to the different ways people travel -- on land, by sea, and in the air -- while it presents them with captivating real-world images, funny puppet shows, and beautiful classical music by Beethoven, Haydn, Mozart and Rossini.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Dive in with your little explorer across the seas to meet amazing animals living in the ocean, coral reef, and polar regions. Overflowing with underwater footage of whales, dolphins, tropical fish, and more, Neptune's Oceans invites you and your baby on an oceanic voyage of discovery!

programme.title: Five Little Ducks Nursery Rhymes & Kids Songs - Boom Buddies
programme.desc: Five Little Duck, Bingo The Dog, Incy Wincy Spider and many more Boom Buddies rhymes! Happy singing!

programme.title: Nursery Rhymes for Children + More Kids Song - Jelly Bears
programme.desc: Join Jelly Bears as they dance to preschool rhymes like Five Little Teddy Bears, Johny Johny and more!

programme.title: Super Supremes Old Macdonald & More Kids Songs
programme.desc: Kids! Are you ready to go round the Farmees town? Hop on-board this Red Wheels On The Bus to enjoy your fun learning ride.

programme.title: Booya Non-Stop
programme.desc: Follow the hilarious adventures of five adorable kooky monsters who live under a kid's bed. Living under the bed is easy and kind of safe but these adorable characters are impulsive, curious, and always ready for fun adventures. With a playful dog who is bent on messing up their plans, the group keeps venturing out, finding ways to dodge the snoopy sniffy, creating chaos and laughter around them.

programme.title: Super Supremes Wheels On The Bus & More Popular Kids Song
programme.desc: Do you kids know Wheels on the Bus? Learn this classic nursery rhyme with The Supremes, plus many other fun songs and dances.

programme.title: Mr. Fruit Nursery Rhymes & Kids Learning Videos
programme.desc: Meet Mr. Fruit, the fun cartoon character! Watch nursery rhymes, learning videos, and baby songs with him. Mr. Fruit makes learning a joyous adventure for kids by providing a perfect blend of fun and early development. It's exciting and helpful for toddlers to learn while having fun. Enjoy the playful way of growing and learning!

programme.title: Mr. Shape Educational Rhymes and Baby Songs
programme.desc: Mr. Shape is a hub of beloved nursery rhymes and engaging content designed to educate preschoolers through the magic of animated cartoons! Children can sing along to popular rhymes and baby songs such as 'Five Little Babies', 'This is the Way', and many more! Our fun videos are made to help kids learn while having a good time. We also teach them important family values and how to stay healthy.

programme.title: Little Red Car - Unlimited Songs
programme.desc: Each this animated children's rhymes compilation with colorful characters, along with catchy music.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic loses his memory when Robotnik uses a hypnotic flower pollen on him, and tells him he's just an "ordinary" guy.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Sonic vanishes mysteriously, Tails enlists the help of a bi-plane pilot named William Le' Duc, and Professor Von Schlemmer.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Wes Weasley lures Tails, Sonic and all of their friends to a yacht under the guise of a "Hero of the Year" ceremony to thank Sonic.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Lazy con-man Bo Beagle has the Choas Emerald ring stuck on his finger, and Robotnik wants it for one of his evil schemes.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Throbbin Screech brings a TV crew to interview Robotnik for "Lifestyles of the Sick and Twisted". Robotnik rampages through the Mobius countryside proving how sick and twisted he is, and Sonic is kept busy doing rescues. Tails decides to take on...

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Momma Robotnik forces her son to run for President of Mobius with Wes Weasley as his campaign manager.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik captures a flute-playing Ninja crane, taps his martial arts knowledge, and transfers it to Scratch and Grounder.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic outsmarts Coconuts, then stumbles into a Convention of Bounty Hunter Robots where Robotnik puts a price on his head. After Sonic defeats all the Robot Bounty Hunters, Robotnik creates Scratch and Grounder to be his S.S.S.S.S. Squad.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails find an underground world of diamonds, but they are held captive there by a miserly Mole-Troll. When Robotnik comes to capture them, he accidently frees them from the Mole-Troll, who teams up with Sonic and Tails to defend his riches.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic saves a damsel in distress, and falls in love with her, not knowing she's a robot built by Robotnik. But when she has a chance to trap him, she helps him escape, realizing she has fallen for him.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Scratch and Grounder use Robotnik's new Slo-Mo Ray Gun to capture Sonic, Tails rescues him by reversing the gun and turning it on a tribe of friendly Tree Sloth People who become a high speed commando strike force against Robotnik.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Tails and other Mobius citizens are lured into Robotnik's robotic games of chance, and when they lose they're sent to slave labor camps. Sonic rescues Tails and the others by beating the house in games of chance at Robotnik's Casino.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Tails gets trapped in the "Warp of Confusion" (an Escher-like world of another dimension) by Robotnik's cousin, Dr. Warpnik, Sonic comes to the rescue and traps Robotnik and his badniks in the warp.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails befriend a pair of aliens who crash land their spaceship on Mobius. Sonic has to avoid Robotnik's ULTRA-GRAVITIZER (sort of a hedgehog flypaper) to help fix their ship and blast-off back home.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik's momma escapes from the home for mothers of villains and demands her birthday present! When she endangers Sonic and Tails, and they manage to have her taken back to the home, even Robotnik is glad to see her go.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Coconuts is exiled by Robotnik to a remote jungle, where he uses a giant baby ape to destroy villages. But Sonic exposes Coconuts as a robot, and the baby ape's real Dad takes Coconuts and the baby ape away for a spanking.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling takes Rainbow Ruby to Ellie's cabin where she meets mischievous baby stars that fell from the sky. The baby stars were playing together, got separated from their mother and ended up in Rainbow Village. // Kiki is extremely upset because the jewel Prince Frederick gave her as a gift broke. The friends try to glue the broken pieces together but it doesn't work. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a jewelry designer and tries designing jewelry with the broken pieces.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: There is a new menu at the restaurant, which is very popular. There is a long line in front of the restaurant but there weren't enough staff members to serve the villagers the food. Rainbow Ruby turns into a waitress using her magic suitcase and serve tables kindly. // Rainbow Village is full of marbles. The marbles that Rainbow Ruby spilled in her room poured down into the village from up above the sky! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a paramedic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina, Thunderbell, and Choco try to cheer Jessy up but their efforts are of no use. While talking to Mayor Ling Ling, Rainbow Ruby realizes that today is the day that Jessy first arrived in Rainbow Village! Jessy was upset that her friends forgot such a meaningful day to her. // Ling Ling has caught a bad cold and was sneezing all over the place. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a doctor and cares for him.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried about the play planned for tonight. There are no costumes ready for the villagers so it's hard to figure out which roles they're playing. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a costume designer and designs costumes for her friends. // It is very windy in Rainbow village and Paige, a paper doll, is flying to wherever the wind takes her. She is so light that she is blown away by the wind. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a fire fighter and rescue Paige.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried that the villagers are all in low spirits. Ruby thinks of fun games to play but the villagers say that they have already played all of the games too many times. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a singer. // Ling Ling is worried because of the "Secret Present Swapping Party" that Thunderbell is preparing. Thunderbell forgot to send out the invitations. Rainbow Ruby turns into a mail carrier and delivers the invitations.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that a Rainbow Ball Tournament is about to start soon but he is worried because the field is covered with pokey pods. Thunderbell, Ellie, and Gina are trying to pick them up and clear the field but it is not easy since the pokey pods are so spikey. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that he lost his glasses. Then Ellie tells her she lost her needles, Gina her hat, and Thunderbell his wheels. Who could have taken away all these things?

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is waiting for Rainbow Ruby, looking worried. It turns out that Mr. Sloth's best friend Chirpee is depressed. Chirpee wants to fly high but is struggling due to his small wings and lack of means to learn how to fly. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that the dress that the paper doll Paige was planning to wear to Kiki's dance party is torn. Paige very much wants to go to the party but she cannot go without a dress.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby is looking at shoes that are now too small for her but she is unwilling to throw away. Ling Ling is worried about Thunderbell. His scooter broke so he is not able to carry out his work as a mail carrier. // Gina calls Rainbow Ruby because today is the day to show their appreciation to Mayor Ling Ling. It took a long time for the village friends to prepare an amazing painting for the mayor. Unfortunately, Thunderbell accidentally destroyed the painting while delivering it.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: There is a new menu at the restaurant, which is very popular. There is a long line in front of the restaurant but there weren't enough staff members to serve the villagers the food. Rainbow Ruby turns into a waitress using her magic suitcase and serve tables kindly. // Rainbow Village is full of marbles. The marbles that Rainbow Ruby spilled in her room poured down into the village from up above the sky! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a paramedic.

Jessy was upset that her friends forgot such a meaningful day to her. // Ling Ling has caught a bad cold and was sneezing all over the place. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a doctor and cares for him.

programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried about the play planned for tonight. There are no costumes ready for the villagers so it's hard to figure out which roles they're playing.
